Your Pocket Idea Generator
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #9—Pocket Idea Generator
Box #1 – Add New Dimensions
Sound, sight, smell, touch, movement,
stillness, change, add order, add
randomness, look at differently, different
emphasis
Box #8 – Convert to a Benefit
Negative into beneficial, exaggerate into a
benefit
Box #9 – Switch Gears
Slow down, speed up, do more, do less, go
overboard
Box #2 – Do the Opposite
Flip, reverse
Box #10 – Revise the Rhythm
Intermittent, continuous
Box #3 – Divide Something Up
Divide, make easy to divide, make more
divided
Box # 11 – Make Something Do
Something Itself
Make it do something it’s not doing now, to
supplement, fix or service
Box #4 – Take Something Out
Remove, extract, isolate, highlight
Box #12 – Change Up the Intensity
Make more intense, less intense
Box #5 – Bring Some Things
Together
Make closer, merge
Box #13 – Add Something to the
Interaction
Intermediary, feedback
Box #6 – Put One Thing Inside
Another
Something inside something, action inside
another
Box #14 – Change the Shape Curve,
straighten, balance, unbalance,
asymmetrical, symmetrical
Box #7 – Do Something
Beforehand
To benefit or avoid problems later
Box #15 – Change the Look
Color, transparency, visibility, porosity
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
